title: get_api_health_returns_status_ok
description: Verify that GET /api/health returns HTTP 200 with a JSON body containing status and message confirming the API is running.

title: post_api_auth_register_creates_new_user
description: Test POST /api/auth/register with valid name, email, and password creates a new user and returns 201 with user id, name, email, and JWT token.

title: post_api_auth_login_authenticates_user
description: Test POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns 200 with user id, name, email, and JWT token.

title: get_api_auth_profile_requires_authentication
description: Verify GET /api/auth/profile returns 200 with user profile when called with valid JWT token, and 401 without token.

title: put_api_auth_profile_updates_user_data
description: Test PUT /api/auth/profile updates user profile fields and returns 200 with updated user data and token.

title: post_api_auth_profile_picture_uploads_image
description: Verify POST /api/auth/profile/picture accepts multipart image data, uploads profile picture, and returns 200 with profilePicture URL.

title: delete_api_auth_profile_picture_removes_image
description: Test DELETE /api/auth/profile/picture removes the user's profile picture and returns 200 with confirmation message.

title: get_api_news_returns_paginated_articles
description: Verify GET /api/news with optional page and category parameters returns 200 with success status, totalResults, articles array, page, and pageSize.

title: post_api_news_article_content_extracts_content
description: Test POST /api/news/article-content with a valid article URL returns 200 with extracted article content.

title: get_api_my_news_preferences_returns_user_topics
description: Verify GET /api/my-news/preferences with valid JWT token returns 200 with user topic preferences.
